entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Major economic and social activity sensitive to climatic variability and climate change

entities.name: CLIMATIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in climate that affect agricultural productivity

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shift in global weather patterns driven by anthropogenic activities

entities.name: INTERGOVERNMENTAL PANEL ON CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: International body that assesses climate change and provides reports

entities.name: ANTHROPOGENIC ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Human-driven activities that cause climate change

entities.name: ADAPTATION OPTIONS
entities.description: A wide array of choices available for agro-ecosystems to cope with climate change

entities.name: AGRO-ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: Agricultural ecosystem requiring resilience and adaptation to climate change

entities.name: ADAPTATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Planned or autonomous approaches designed to reduce vulnerability and improve resilience

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The degree of susceptibility of agriculture and rural poor to climate change impacts

entities.name: RURAL POOR
entities.description: Human populations in rural areas vulnerable to climate change

entities.name: AUTONOMOUS ADAPTATION
entities.description: Spontaneous adjustments in physical, ecological, and human systems to resource availability and risks

entities.name: PLANNED ADAPTATION
entities.description: Deliberate and designed strategies to reduce the impact of anthropogenic climate change

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of agro-ecosystems to recover from or withstand climate change impacts

entities.name: INDUSTRIALIZED COUNTRIES
entities.description: Nations with advanced industrial economies needing consensus on climate adaptation

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Nations with developing economies needing consensus on climate adaptation

entities.name: PUBLIC POLICIES
entities.description: National, regional, and local government frameworks to support adaptation

entities.name: ADAPTATION RESEARCH
entities.description: Scientific study aimed at supporting climate adaptation

entities.name: INSURANCES
entities.description: Financial risk management tools for farmers to adapt to climate change

entities.name: INCENTIVES
entities.description: Motivations provided to farmers to encourage the adoption of new technologies

entities.name: NEW TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technical innovations used as part of climate adaptation strategies
